summary: Iteration 54: Homepage layout improvements verified. Backend 100% pass (11/11 tests). Frontend verified via Playwright - desktop 2-column layout works correctly, mobile layout with horizontal category pills working, all category filters function properly, vehicle cards display correctly with Détails button navigating to /booking/{id}.

issues: Some vehicle photos from Unsplash show incorrect content (e.g., gym equipment for Toyota Yaris) - this is an external Unsplash image URL issue, not a code bug

details.compact_header: LogiRent with 'BIENVENUE CHEZ' greeting, no big hero image
details.2_column_layout: Vehicles on LEFT, Search sidebar on RIGHT
details.search_panel: Contains search bar, category filters (Tous, SUV, Berline, Citadine, Utilitaire), stats (12+ Véhicules, 24/7 Support)
details.benefits_section: Pourquoi LogiRent? with 4 benefits in sidebar

details.mobile_search: Compact search bar with arrow button
details.horizontal_category_pills: Tous, SUV, Berline, Citadine visible in horizontal scroll

details.suv_filter: Shows 4 vehicles (Porsche Cayenne, Peugeot 3008, Audi Q5, Porsche Macan)

details.displays: Price (CHF), Brand, Model, Year, specs (seats, transmission, fuel)

details.bottom_navigation: Shows Accueil, Véhicules, Locations, Notifs, Profil

critical_code_review_comments: Homepage code is well-structured with clear separation of SearchPanel (desktop) and MobileSearch components
Responsive design using useWindowDimensions with isDesktop = width >= 1024 breakpoint
AnimatedCard component provides smooth fade-in animation for vehicle cards
All category filters correctly call handleTypeSelect which updates store and fetches filtered vehicles
data-testid attributes properly set on all interactive elements
VehicleCard component correctly shows price, brand, model, year, and Détails button linking to /booking/{id}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage layout improvements complete and verified. Desktop shows 2-column layout (vehicles left, search sidebar right). Mobile shows compact search + horizontal category pills. Category filtering works correctly via API. Login redirects to /reservations, then navigating to Accueil shows new homepage layout. All 11 backend tests pass. Previous ngrok tunnel issues (iteration 53) appear resolved.
